PlaceDeckPlatingStep1.title: Building Deck Plating
PlaceDeckPlatingStep1.description: Now we can increase the floor space by placing down some [color=KHAKI]Deck Plating[/color]. Select the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Deck Plating[/color] button from the Structures tab in the [color=PURPLE]Building[/color] menu.

PlaceDeckPlatingStep2.description:
Place this over the white highlighted area and wait for your crew to finish building them.

Remember, this can only ever be placed on top of [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color] and also needs to be surrounded by additional [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color].
